column1: お先に失礼させてもらいます。
column2: おさきにしつれいさせてもらいます。
column3: I'll take my leave ahead of you.
column4: させてもらう (to take the liberty of / to have the honor of doing)
column5: Verb[causative-stem] + させてもらう / Verb[causative] + ていただく (formal)
column6: politely framing an action as something the speaker humbly does with the other person's implied permission; 'allow me to do X'
column8: させてもらう = humble + receive permission (casual-polite); させていただく = humble + receive permission (formal); させてください = please allow me to
